posts.title: Tobacco Smokefree Research Dataset Available
posts.description: New tobacco smokefree research dataset released via the openFDA platform.

posts.title: Tobacco Prevention Ads Research Dataset Available
posts.description: Tobacco prevention advertising research data released examining advertising influence on youth attitudes.

posts.title: Tobacco Digital Ads Research Dataset Available
posts.description: Digital tobacco advertising research data released for public health research.

posts.title: Cosmetic Adverse Events Dataset Available
posts.description: Adverse event reporting data for cosmetics now available via openFDA.

posts.title: Complete Response Letters Released
posts.description: Complete Response Letters (CRLs) for NDAs and BLAs through 2025 now available via openFDA.

posts.title: Drug Shortages Dataset Available
posts.description: Drug shortage information released to help patients, providers, and researchers track availability.

posts.title: Historical Documents Dataset Available
posts.description: Historical FDA documents (press releases 1913-2014) now accessible via openFDA.

posts.title: Wildcard Search Feature Enabled
posts.description: All openFDA API endpoints now support wildcard search functionality for more flexible querying.

posts.title: UDI API Updated with GMDN Code
posts.description: Global Medical Device Nomenclature (GMDN) code integration added to the UDI API.

posts.title: UNII Dataset Released
posts.description: Unique Ingredient Identifier (UNII) data now available via openFDA for chemical and substance lookups.

posts.title: System Architecture Upgrade
posts.description: Significant infrastructure improvements to support growing demand for openFDA API services.

posts.title: Data Dictionary Now Available
posts.description: Comprehensive data documentation released to help users understand field definitions and data sources.

posts.title: Tobacco Problem Reports Available
posts.description: Tobacco incident reporting data now accessible via openFDA for safety surveillance research.

posts.title: Drugs@FDA Available via openFDA
posts.description: Drugs@FDA approved drug information database now available through the openFDA API platform.

posts.title: COVID-19 Serological Tests Evaluations
posts.description: Independent evaluations of COVID-19 serological tests now available through openFDA.

posts.title: 200 Million API Calls Milestone
posts.description: openFDA reaches 200 million API calls milestone, demonstrating widespread use for public health research.

posts.title: Substance Data Endpoint Available
posts.description: Chemical and molecular substance information data released via openFDA including UNII identifiers.

posts.title: Animal Drug Adverse Events Dataset
posts.description: First animal drug adverse event dataset made publicly available through openFDA.

posts.title: NDC Directory Available
posts.description: National Drug Code (NDC) directory now accessible via openFDA for drug product identification.

posts.title: Medical Device Data Released
posts.description: Medical device information released to support innovation and research through openFDA.

posts.title: Medical Device Reports Access
posts.description: Device adverse event reporting data made available via openFDA.

posts.title: Drug Product Labeling Information
posts.description: FDA-approved prescription drug labeling data now searchable via openFDA.

posts.title: Recall Data Access
posts.description: Food, drug, and device recall information from enforcement reports now available via openFDA.

posts.title: openFDA Launch Announcement
posts.description: The openFDA public data initiative is launched, providing REST API access to FDA regulatory datasets.
